title: Ernst Thälmann - Führer seiner Klasse
actors: Günther Simon, Hans-Peter Minetti, Karla Runkehl
plot: The second part of the Ernst Thälmann films encompasses the time period between 1930 and Thälmann's murder in 1944. It shows Thälmann's battle to achieve a united front with all German workers against the National Socialists, his ...
